results.title: 'Surrender Till 5 PM Tomorrow': Shiv Sena Corporator Ramesh Mhatre's Bail Cancelled Over Assaulting Doctors
results.description: The Bombay High Court on Saturday cancelled the bail granted to Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre.
